ab: kelan cu tutux na intana’an, Yawi ka ralu’ ni. ṟumungi’ maras karirex ci angaya’ ni.
ch: 我有一個同學叫Yawi，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Yawi, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: lunpuw min ci patas ga, kuncik ci papatas, papuṟut lu papatasan cika intana’an mu.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: min’utux, minsa’ing, aṟat ga mintugal, pakacikan naha hang.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: ho’ ga, ṟakah la a’usa’ ni. kuncik ci angaya’ ga, ini’ bah mubinah.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: kani ka ini’ pakacik hiyan ka ci’uli’ la.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: cel tutux rex, musa’ min salahaw tanux kora’ min.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: cacka na tu’uy, makmusa’ mastanux ka Yawi, ho’ ga, ṟumungi’ maras ci kulabuy.
ch: 路途中，Yawi想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Yawi wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: kuncik kulabuy ci intana’an ni. ho’ ga, cumik hiyan kora’ ka laha, ini’ cu nak aras uṟi sun naha.
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: maku mangilis ka Yawi pintahlan ni. masang maha; hunco’ mamu ini’ pakacik ci kulabuy kinang!
ch: Yawi急的哭了出來。他生氣的說，為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!
en: Yawi burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: kumaṟal hiyan ka intana’an, ya ka ini’ su’ bah maras ka isu’, pinkacik sinang ka angaya’ ga, ini’ su’ pabinahi kora’.
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: sasan, maṟabuna’ tehuk papasba’an ci ke’ ka Yawi, pabinahun ni mi’ ci intana’an ni kora’ ka angaya’ kincikan ni la.
ch: 隔天上學，Yawi很早就到學校了，Yawi把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Yawi arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: mastukung ci intana’an ni ka Yawi maha: pa’aras cu nak ci angaya’ babuw ni la. bahbah mamu caṟung, sumoṟal mamu pakacik ci angaya’ kinang.
ch: Yawi向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: Yawi apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
